Event: The Orc Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 01/10/2023
Sage Bot Item Code: A12


Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Red Dragon
Message from the Glaciers

Launches ice missiles at the closes and farthest enemies. Missiles deal 200000 magic damage and freeze the targets for 3 sec. Also the cooldown times of the target's gear abilities are increased by 3 sec. All enemies in a small radius around the frozen units gain stiffness. Their attack speed is reduced by 25% for 3 sec.
Every 3 attacks the unit makes against the stiff target causes an explosion, dealing 150000 magic damage to the target and all enemies in a small radius around it. The explosion has a 100% chance to freeze all affected enemies for 2 sec. While frozen, they can't move or attack for 2 sec. Also, the cooldown times of the target's gear abilities and artifact abilities are increased by 2 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
